events.label: reasoning
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "in-progress",
  "component_conditions": ["non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 0,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Lockout/tagout device is incomplete: lock without tag or tag without lock observed.",
    "OSHA 1910.147 requires that each lockout or tagout device be uniquely identified and used in conjunction with a tag that includes the identity of the authorized employee applying it."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately.",
    "Ensure that all energy isolation points have both a lock and a tag applied, with the tag containing the required information (employee name, date, etc.).",
    "Verify that the lockout/tagout procedure is being followed per OSHA 1910.147 and the site-specific program.",
    "Retrain personnel on proper lockout/tagout application if necessary."
  ],
  "rationale": "A lock without a tag or a tag without a lock violates OSHA 1910.147 requirements for a complete lockout/tagout device. This condition compromises the safety of the procedure, as the tag provides critical information about the lockout and the authorized employee. Work cannot proceed until the deficiency is corrected.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(5)(ii)(C)(2)",
    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(5)(ii)(D)"
  ]
}
